about.title: About Us
about.desc: History, team and values of RCONS.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.desc: Address, phone and email of RCONS.

services.title: Services
services.desc: Full range of audit and consulting services.

resources.title: Documents & Resources
resources.desc: Official documents, SRO certificates, disclosure and auditor qualifications.

documents.title: Internal Documents
documents.desc: Accounting policies, quality standards and internal regulations.

audit.title: Audit
audit.desc: Statutory and voluntary audit, specialized reporting

mandatory-rsbu.title: Statutory Audit (RAS) — LLC, JSC, PJSC
mandatory-rsbu.desc: Annual mandatory audit of financial statements under Federal Law No. 307-FZ.

mandatory-gup.title: Statutory Audit — State Enterprises & Entities with Government Ownership
mandatory-gup.desc: Audit of state and municipal unitary enterprises and entities with government ownership.

mandatory-nko.title: Audit of NPOs, Foundations & Associations
mandatory-nko.desc: Statutory and voluntary audit of non-profit organizations, foundations and associations.

mandatory-developer.title: Audit of Developers (214-FZ)
mandatory-developer.desc: Specialized audit of developers under 214-FZ: escrow accounts, financial stability ratios.

initiative.title: Voluntary Audit by Shareholder or Bank Request
initiative.desc: Voluntary audit at the decision of owners or lending bank.

special-assignment.title: Special Purpose Audit
special-assignment.desc: Verification of specific transactions, financial figures or ownership rights.

tax-audit.title: Tax Audit (Risk & Overpayment Review)
tax-audit.desc: Comprehensive review of tax calculations. Risk and overpayment identification.

strategic-programs.title: Audit of Strategic Development Programs
strategic-programs.desc: Review of strategic programs, investment projects and KPI execution.

pif.title: Audit of Mutual Funds & Asset Managers
pif.desc: Audit of mutual funds and management companies per Central Bank requirements.

pension.title: Confirmation of Pension Assets in Trust Management
pension.desc: Audit of management company reporting on pension assets in trust management.

tax.title: Tax
tax.desc: Tax consulting, audit support, VAT refund, restructuring

consulting.title: Tax Consulting
consulting.desc: One-time consultations and written opinions on VAT, income tax, personal income tax, transfer pricing.

subscription.title: Tax Retainer — Ongoing Support
subscription.desc: Regular tax support: legislation monitoring, consultations, contract review.

pre-inspection.title: Pre-Inspection Analysis
pre-inspection.desc: Tax risk diagnostics before a potential FTS field audit.

inspection-support.title: Tax Audit Support
inspection-support.desc: Representation during tax audits: responses to FTS requests, objections to audit reports.

pre-trial.title: Pre-Trial Appeal of FTS Decisions
pre-trial.desc: Appeals and complaints to higher tax authorities against FTS decisions.

vat-refund.title: VAT Refund
vat-refund.desc: Support for VAT refund procedures from the budget.

restructuring.title: Tax Restructuring
restructuring.desc: Legal tax optimization during restructuring: mergers, spin-offs, holding structures.

declaration.title: Personal Tax Returns (PIT, CFC)
declaration.desc: Personal income tax returns, CFC notifications, foreign account reporting.

valuation.title: Valuation
valuation.desc: Business, assets, real estate, cadastral value disputes

business-valuation.title: Business, Shares & Equity Valuation
business-valuation.desc: Independent fair market value assessment of businesses, shares and LLC interests.

intangibles.title: Intangible Assets Valuation
intangibles.desc: Valuation of brands, software, patents, licenses and customer bases.

ma-valuation.title: M&A Valuation
ma-valuation.desc: Independent opinion on fair deal price for M&A and investor attraction.

real-estate.title: Commercial Real Estate Valuation
real-estate.desc: Valuation of offices, retail, warehouses and hotels.

land.title: Land Valuation
land.desc: Market value of land plots of all categories.

vehicles.title: Vehicle Valuation
vehicles.desc: Cars, special equipment, aircraft and watercraft.

equipment.title: Equipment & Production Assets Valuation
equipment.desc: Production equipment and fixed assets valuation.

cadastral.title: Cadastral Value Dispute
cadastral.desc: Reducing cadastral value at Rosreestr or court.

bank-valuation.title: Bank Valuation (Collateral & Lending)
bank-valuation.desc: Valuation reports for lending banks. Accredited with major Russian banks.

damage.title: Damage & Loss Assessment
damage.desc: Actual damage and lost profit assessment for disputes.

due-diligence.title: Due Diligence
due-diligence.desc: Financial, tax, legal and operational DD for M&A

financial-dd.title: Financial Due Diligence
financial-dd.desc: Review of financial health: reporting, cash flows, debt, accounting systems.

tax-dd.title: Tax Due Diligence
tax-dd.desc: Tax obligations and risks: history, hidden liabilities, FTS exposure.

legal-dd.title: Legal Due Diligence
legal-dd.desc: Legal risks: corporate structure, licenses, litigation, contracts, IP.

operational-dd.title: Operational Due Diligence
operational-dd.desc: Operating model, processes, key staff, IT systems, market position.

complex-dd.title: Comprehensive Due Diligence
complex-dd.desc: Full DD across all areas. One team, one report. M&A, investment, lending.

full-accounting.title: Full Accounting Outsourcing
full-accounting.desc: CFO function outsourced: all accounting, reporting, FTS interaction.

payroll.title: Payroll & HR Records
payroll.desc: Payroll calculation, HR documentation, employment contracts.

restoration.title: Accounting Recovery
restoration.desc: Restoring neglected accounting: documents, corrections, amended returns.

zero-reporting.title: Nil Returns
zero-reporting.desc: Preparation and filing of nil returns for dormant companies.

accounting-policy.title: Accounting Policy & Methodology
accounting-policy.desc: Development of accounting policies, chart of accounts, non-standard operation methods.

financial-consulting.title: Financial Consulting
financial-consulting.desc: Analysis, business planning, modeling, management reporting

analysis.title: Financial Analysis & Company Diagnostics
analysis.desc: Liquidity, profitability, stability analysis and improvement recommendations.

business-planning.title: Business Planning & Investment Analysis
business-planning.desc: Business plans for fundraising. NPV, IRR, sensitivity analysis.

modeling.title: Financial Modeling & Budgeting
modeling.desc: Cash flow, P&L and balance sheet models. Scenario planning.

management-reporting.title: Management Reporting Development
management-reporting.desc: Management accounting system: report structure, KPIs, executive dashboards.

legal-outsourcing.title: Legal Outsourcing
legal-outsourcing.desc: Retainer legal support: consultations, contracts, corporate documents.

litigation.title: Litigation & Court Representation
litigation.desc: All arbitration court levels. Tax, civil and administrative disputes.

bankruptcy.title: Bankruptcy & Liquidation
bankruptcy.desc: All bankruptcy procedures and voluntary liquidation.

corporate.title: Corporate Advisory
corporate.desc: Corporate transactions, reorganization, M&A, shareholder agreements.

hero.title: Audit and Consulting for Your Business
hero.subtitle: Professional audit, tax consulting and financial analysis
